ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mesh_types" (
  "mesh_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mesh type */,
  "mesh_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mesh type (e.g., Linear-Tet, Linear-Hex, Quad-Tet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mesh type */,
  "material_compatibility" TEXT /* A JSON column to store a list of materials that the mesh type is compatible with */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the mesh type was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the mesh type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mesh_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mesh_sizes" (
  "mesh_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mesh size */,
  "mesh_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the mesh size (e.g., coarse, fine) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mesh size */,
  "element_count" INTEGER /* The number of elements in the mesh size */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* The type of elements used in the mesh size (e.g., tetrahedral, hexahedral) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the mesh size was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the mesh size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mesh_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation software package */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation software package (e.g., Calculix, Code_Aster, Elmer) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation software package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The date when the software version was released */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* The type of license (e.g., open-source, commercial) */,
  "installation_requirements" TEXT /* A JSON column to store the system requirements for installing the software */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the software entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation experiment */,
  "mesh_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mesh type used in the simulation */,
  "mesh_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mesh size used in the simulation */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation software package used */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric of the simulation (e.g., time taken, accuracy) */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* The name of the simulation experiment */,
  "date_run" TEXT /* The date when the simulation was run */,
  "input_file" TEXT /* The name of the input file used for the simulation */,
  "output_file" TEXT /* The name of the output file generated by the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the simulation (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the simulation was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the simulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_mesh_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mesh_type_id") REFERENCES mesh_types ("mesh_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_mesh_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("mesh_size_id") REFERENCES mesh_sizes ("mesh_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES simulation_software ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
